name: app_findjobsinfinland
description: Find Jobs In Finland — Native Mobile App (Capacitor)

scripts.sync: npm run copy:www && npx cap sync
scripts.sync:android: npm run copy:www && npx cap sync android
scripts.sync:ios: npm run copy:www && npx cap sync ios
scripts.build:android: npm run sync:android && npx cap open android
scripts.build:ios: npm run sync:ios && npx cap open ios
